diagrams.title: WCAG POUR Principles
diagrams.description: Four core accessibility principles with sub-criteria
elements: Perceivable: Text alternatives, Captions, Adaptable layout, Distinguishable
Operable: Keyboard accessible, Enough time, Seizures avoided, Navigable
Robust: Compatible with current and future user agents

Documentation: Usage guidelines, Code snippets, Best practices
